description: Plugin-distributed hooks for people-operations-hr. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: review this People-Ops deliverable against the §3 house opinions (baseline on every metric, source+date on every benchmark, no employee PII). Set PEOPLE_OPERATIONS_HR_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
